title: Hats
description: Set anything as a hat by using the /hat command.
body:
This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

This mod adds a custom command (/hat) which allows you to swap the item on your main hand with the item on your helmet slot.

![Player with a flowering azalea on their head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cd0576d57025b74731b075a3322005f15a9a023_0.webp)

If used in survival, **it will not** remove gear with the "curse of binding" enchantment.

Can be used on client for single-player worlds, if installed server-side it's not needed in the client.
